update_expression: CASE __value__ WHEN 777 THEN -777 WHEN 888 THEN -888 ELSE -999 END
comment: Legacy positive sentinel recoded to HESP negative sentinel convention (-777 refused, -888 don't know, -999 not collected).
Structural skip: household is not a cash renter (tenure 1/2/4/5), so monthly_rent is out of universe and set to -666 (Not applicable).
Source exported rent in cents; converted to whole dollars (divide by 100, round). Runs after sentinel recode so 999999999 is never treated as cents.
Debt balance arrived as a signed liability; stored as a positive amount per HESP convention. Negative sentinels preserved by the guard.

condition:
reference_education IN (-777, -888, -999)
AND LAG(reference_education) OVER (PARTITION BY household_id ORDER BY wave) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
update_expression: LAG(reference_education) OVER (PARTITION BY household_id ORDER BY wave)
comment: Missing education carried forward from the household's previous wave (stable characteristic). Set an imputation flag downstream.

condition: household_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT regexp_full_match(household_id, 'HH[0-9]{8}')
comment: Legacy household_id formats (e.g. 'hh-42', 'HH 00000042') normalized to canonical HH######## via regex capture groups.
Disclosure top-code: incomes above $1.5M capped for the public-use file. Enable only when producing the public release.
